attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CALENDAR_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.SHIFT_SEQUENCE_NUMBER, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.SHIFT_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.SHIFT_START_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.SHIFT_END_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CSA_RESOURCE_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CSA_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CSA_TEAM_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN,
(
select CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN
minus
select CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN
) ACM
where 
 ACM.CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN_ID = STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_ASSIGN)
